rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies the conceptual issue of framing the method as a PINN when it is not, but does not fully articulate the mismatch between the description and the actual training objective.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names one prior work (DeepONet) and articulates a delta, but does not map against other relevant works in the field.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for some claims, but the level of detail is insufficient to assess the full extent of uncertainty disclosure.
rationale.RX.3: The agent correctly identifies that the output mostly adheres to the scope requested.
rationale.RX.4: The agent scores this dimension as 3, indicating minor regressions. However, no specific examples are provided to support this claim.
rationale.RX.5: The agent does not provide any evidence of provenance and traceability.
